bio.title: 👋 Welcome!
bio.text:
This website was created in order to share with you some of my personal web projects.
I hope you will like it.

  • => If you want to know if you have a better memory than a monkey try KALD!
  • => Or maybe you just want to play with DB2048?
  • => Ok I see! you want to know if a star wa(r)s born on the same day as you, so try VIPBORNTODAY!

Have a super great visit!
